money_flow_summary: Money flows from buyers, renters, and owners through agents (2.5-3% commission), property managers (8-12% of rent), title companies, and mortgage lenders. The US real estate market is $45T in assets with massive friction — AI is now compressing 30-day transaction cycles into days and replacing tasks that required licensed professionals.

niches.name: Real Estate Listing Description & Marketing Automation

top_opportunities.title: AI Property Management Communication Agent
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an AI agent for landlords and property managers that handles 90% of tenant communication: maintenance requests (triages, dispatches vendors, follows up), lease renewals (drafts notices, answers questions), rent reminders, and move-in/out coordination. Charge $29-$99/door/mo. Small landlords (5-50 units) are the most underserved segment — can't afford a full PM company but drown in communication.
top_opportunities.moat: Property and tenant data creates stickiness; vendor network integration deepens value over time
top_opportunities.first_step: Build SMS/email AI responder using Twilio + Claude; create maintenance request triage workflow; offer free 90-day trial to 10 landlords via BiggerPockets forum
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI handles every tenant message 24/7 — responding to the 11pm 'my heat isn't working' message, creating a work order, and texting the HVAC contractor, without the landlord lifting a finger

top_opportunities.title: Investment Property Deal Analyzer (Automated Underwriting)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Scrape Zillow, Redfin, and county tax records to pull property data. When a user enters an address or MLS listing, AI automatically calculates NOI, cap rate, cash-on-cash return, GRM, rent comps, and 5-year pro forma. Integrate with Rentometer for rent data. Charge $49-$149/mo to real estate investors. Replaces the 3-hour spreadsheet analysis per deal.
top_opportunities.moat: Historical deal analysis creates proprietary market benchmarks; saved portfolio creates switching cost
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Zillow scraper + rent comp analysis; create deal analysis PDF report template; post demo analysis in r/realestateinvesting
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI writes the investment narrative ('This property is priced 12% above comparable cap rates in this zip code — here are 3 comparable sales') that would take an analyst 2 hours to write

top_opportunities.title: Real Estate Listing Copy & Marketing Automation for Agents
top_opportunities.niche: Real Estate Listing Description & Marketing Automation
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a tool that takes MLS data + photos and generates: (1) compelling listing description, (2) social media posts for Instagram/Facebook, (3) email campaign for buyer agent database, (4) property website with AI-generated copy. Charge real estate agents $49-$199/listing or $99/mo subscription. 1.5M+ active real estate agents in the US each list multiple properties per year.
top_opportunities.moat: Agent's past listing style trains personalized writing voice; MLS integration creates workflow embedding
top_opportunities.first_step: Build MLS data input form + Claude listing description generator; offer first 3 listings free; post in real estate Facebook groups and ActiveRain
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI generates emotionally resonant listing copy that highlights the right features for the neighborhood's buyer demographic — what top-producing agents' assistants spend 2 hours on per listing
